hero.eyebrow: Qualified plumbing across South East London
hero.title: Plumbing fixed properly, without the guesswork.
hero.description: Responsive engineers, clear prices and tidy workmanship for emergencies, boilers, bathrooms, leaks and planned installations.

items.title: Qualified engineers
items.description: Experienced, trained plumbers with documented credentials.

items.title: Fully insured
items.description: Public liability cover for domestic and commercial work.

items.title: Clear quotations
items.description: Scope and pricing explained before planned work begins.

items.title: Workmanship guarantee
items.description: Written cover for completed repairs and installations.

services.title: One careful team for every water system
services.description: From the urgent drip to a full bathroom refit, we diagnose first and explain the practical options clearly.

items.name: Emergency plumbing
items.description: Rapid response for active leaks, burst pipes, loss of water and urgent isolation.
items.imageAlt: Professional plumber responding in a bright bathroom

items.name: Boilers & heating
items.description: Boiler faults, radiator issues, controls, servicing and planned replacement.

items.name: Leak detection
items.description: Careful investigation of visible and hidden leaks with minimum disruption.
items.imageAlt: Plumber checking for a hidden leak

items.name: Bathrooms
items.description: First-fix pipework, sanitaryware, taps, showers and complete bathroom installations.

items.name: Pipes & drainage
items.description: Repairs, rerouting, blockages, waste pipes and dependable drainage improvements.

items.name: Repairs & maintenance
items.description: Toilets, taps, valves, tanks and routine property maintenance for homes and landlords.

items.name: Commercial plumbing
items.description: Planned work, reactive repairs and maintenance support for offices, shops and small sites.

comparison.title: From corroded and leaking to clean and dependable.
comparison.description: Drag the control—or use your keyboard arrow keys—to inspect a matched under-basin repair from the same camera position.
comparison.beforeAlt: Before repair: corroded leaking pipes and water staining under a bathroom basin
comparison.afterAlt: After repair: neat new under-basin pipework and a clean dry cabinet
comparison.controlLabel: Compare the plumbing before and after repair

process.title: A straightforward job from first call to sign-off
process.description: You get useful communication, evidence where it matters and a tidy property at the end.
process.imageAlt: Clearflow plumber carefully completing a bathroom installation

steps.title: Tell us the issue
steps.description: Call or send details, photos and your postcode so we can triage correctly.

steps.title: Inspect & explain
steps.description: We find the cause, show the evidence and outline sensible options.

steps.title: Approve the work
steps.description: For planned jobs, scope and price are confirmed before we begin.

steps.title: Repair & test
steps.description: Work is completed, pressure-tested, cleaned and demonstrated.

packages.title: Clear starting prices
packages.description: Final pricing depends on access, parts and scope. You will always be told before additional work is carried out.

items.name: Standard call-out
items.description: Diagnosis and first hour for everyday plumbing faults.

items.name: Emergency response
items.description: Priority attendance for active leaks and urgent plumbing failures.

items.name: Landlord care
items.description: Organised reactive and planned plumbing support for managed homes.

areas.title: Local coverage, practical response times

contact.title: Tell us what's happening.
contact.description: Send the issue, postcode and preferred timing. For active leaks or loss of water, call the emergency line.
